currentState: Careful rescuer and traumatized witness. Jaina earns Miri's cooperation by asking permission, lowering her profile, and helping translate fragments into usable testimony.
powerDynamic: Jaina has magical and adult authority, but she deliberately softens both so the child can keep enough control to answer at all.

physicalDynamics.pattern: Jaina keeps an inch of space above Miri's skin before contact, then kneels low beside Neral instead of crowding the child.

nameUsage.jainaCallsMiri: Uses her name immediately and asks permission-shaped questions.
nameUsage.miriCallsJaina: Accepts her as a safe adult helper rather than a commander.

history.event: Jaina confirms Miri is uncontaminated and helps pull the few useful pieces out of her broken account.

trajectory: Stranger -> cautious trust under rescue conditions.
